scene: Transfiguration — cloud overshadows
Blind Bartimaeus throws off his cloak and runs to Jesus
Fig tree cursed — all leaves, no fruit; temple cleansed
Coin of Caesar — 'Render to Caesar… render to God'
Olivet Discourse — 'Watch! You do not know when'
Woman breaks alabaster jar — Last Supper, Gethsemane, Peter denies
Crucifixion — curtain torn; centurion: 'Truly this was the Son of God'
Stone rolled away — 'He is risen, He is not here'
'The God of all comfort — comforts us in all our affliction'
'We are the aroma of Christ — fragrance of life or death'
Moses' veil — we with unveiled face behold His glory
Treasure in jars of clay — struck down but not destroyed
Earthly tent destroyed — we have a building from God
'We are the temple of the living God'
Titus brings good news — Paul's tears of joy over Corinth
'The grace of our Lord Jesus — though He was rich, became poor'
'Whoever sows sparingly reaps sparingly — God loves a cheerful giver'
'Our weapons are not of the flesh — we demolish arguments'
Paul becomes a 'fool' to list his sufferings
'A thorn in the flesh — my grace is sufficient for you'
'Examine yourselves to see whether you are in the faith'
'I was a blasphemer, persecutor, violent man — but I received mercy'
'I desire men to pray lifting holy hands'
'If a man cannot manage his own household how can he care for God's church?'
'Train yourself for godliness'
The widow's list — qualifications for enrollment
'Love of money is a root of all kinds of evil'
'Fan into flame the gift of God' — guard the good deposit
Soldier, athlete, farmer — suffer hardship with Christ
'All Scripture is breathed out by God' — sacred writings
'I have fought the good fight… the crown of righteousness awaits me'
'If we say we have fellowship with Him but walk in darkness we lie'
'Do not love the world — the world is passing away'
'Whoever hates his brother is a murderer' — Cain as warning
'We love because He first loved us'
'This is He who came by water and blood — Jesus Christ'
'Cretans are always liars, evil beasts, lazy gluttons' — appoint elders anyway
'Adorn the doctrine of God our Savior in everything'
'He saved us through the washing of regeneration and renewing of the Holy Spirit'
'If he has wronged you or owes you anything — charge that to my account' (v.18)
Add to faith: virtue → knowledge → self-control → steadfastness → godliness → love
'The dog returns to its vomit — the sow to the mud' — false teachers
'The Day of the Lord will come like a thief — the heavens will pass away with a roar'
'Certain people have crept in unnoticed — who long ago were designated for condemnation' (v.4)
'Do not receive him into your house or give him any greeting' (v.10) — the false teacher at the door
'Diotrephes who likes to put himself first does not acknowledge our authority' (v.9)
'Our gospel came to you not in word only but in power — you became an example to all Macedonia'
'We were gentle among you like a nursing mother caring for her children'
'You are our glory and joy — our crown' — Timothy's good report
'The Lord will descend with a trumpet call — the dead in Christ rise first'
'The Day of the Lord comes like a thief in the night — but you are children of light'
'The Lord Jesus revealed from heaven in flaming fire — taking vengeance on those who do not know God'
'The one who restrains will be taken out of the way — then the lawless one will be revealed'
'If anyone is not willing to work let him not eat' — Paul worked for his own bread
